Video.summary: Jennifer shares that no matter what you experience, you get to decide how you react to these situations and what role you play in them.
Video.title: How To Honor Your Freedom of Choice - Jennifer Powers

Image.alt: How To Honor Your Freedom of Choice - Jennifer Powers
How To Honor Your Freedom of Choice - Jennifer Powers
How To Honor Your Freedom of Choice - Jennifer Powers

Video.summary: Arielle discusses her book “Turn Your Mate Into Your SoulMate” and shares why everyone needs to read this if they want a deep fulfilling relationship.
Video.title: How To Make Your Mate Your Soulmate With Arielle Ford

Image.alt: How To Make Your Mate Your Soulmate With Arielle Ford
How To Make Your Mate Your Soulmate With Arielle Ford
How To Make Your Mate Your Soulmate With Arielle Ford

Video.summary: Lisa Garr talks with expert numerologist Glynis McCants. Known as “The Numbers Lady,” she talks about the history of Numerology as a numbers system and as a science used by Pythagoras forward. She explains about your life path & your personal year.
Video.title: The Aware Show - Numerology with The Numbers Lady!

Image.alt: The Aware Show - Numerology with The Numbers Lady!
The Aware Show - Numerology with The Numbers Lady!
The Aware Show - Numerology with The Numbers Lady!

Video.summary: Lisa Garr talks with Nadine Artemis, founder of natural skin care company Living Libations, about how most “natural” beauty products contain traces of chemicals. Artemis believes that each plant has a certain vibration which can be used in healing.
Video.title: The Aware Show - Healthy Living Beauty!

Image.alt: The Aware Show - Healthy Living Beauty!
The Aware Show - Healthy Living Beauty!
The Aware Show - Healthy Living Beauty!

Video.summary: Lisa Garr talks with author and spiritual teacher Sadhvi Bhagawati Saraswati about knowing when to trust a deep, inner calling. She was completing her Ph.D. at Stanford when she left America to live in India, where she has been for over 25 years.
Video.title: The Aware Show - Hollywood to the Himalayas

Image.alt: The Aware Show - Hollywood to the Himalayas
The Aware Show - Hollywood to the Himalayas
The Aware Show - Hollywood to the Himalayas

Video.summary: Your day 5 practice introduces principles of stability or Sthira. Though this practice we learn to to steady the mind as we strengthen the body. Build on yesterday’s practice to marry effort with ease. Invite your breath to be smooth and even as we continue to build on your foundation.
Video.title: Day 5: Stability

Video.summary: Your day 6 practice invites you to use core work to get clear. In this session we use controlled movement to activate the muscles of the abdominal for a strong and healthy back and strengthen your whole self.
Video.title: Day 6: Clarity

Video.summary: Your Day 7 practice is an invitation right to the good stuff. This fiery session is a warming sequence that guides to you create a healthy flow of energy in the body welcoming total mind and body health.
Video.title: Day 7: Prana

Video.summary: Your day 9 practice asks you to check in with body and breath as a way of cultivating more awareness. The journey continues! The vocabulary grows. Move fearlessly through this practice by simply listening to your body. Check your habits and move with intention as a way of moving forward with confidence and focus.
Video.title: Day 9: Bold

Video.summary: Your day 10 practice starts with a standing warm up and eases into a yoga flow for balance and transformation! Bring calm alertness to the mind and body as you continue to ride the wave of the breath. Build a strong foundation to set yourself up for greatness. Be patient and courageous.
Video.title: Day 10: Balance

Video.summary: DR. Fernando Mendoza & MERIC TENDRICH - Swim Safety DR. BETH RUHMAN - Signs of Stress
Video.title: Health Insiders S1E40

Video.summary: DR. BETH RUHMANN - Understanding Stress DR. VICTORIA BEDELL & DR. JEANNA BEDELL - Maternity Care DR. AURA TOVAR & ADRIANNA LOPEZ - Healthy Living
Video.title: Health Insiders S1E41

Video.summary: JC QUINTANA - Water Safety CATHY CLARK REYES & ADRIANNE CALVO - Nutritious Recipes DAN SIMMONS - Addiction
Video.title: Health Insiders S1E42

Video.summary: In the premiere episode of Fund Tank, viewers are introduced to Charlie Cimitile, an enterprising entrepreneur with a passion for the burgeoning cannabis industry. With a background in medical device sales, Charlie shares his journey of starting Day 1 Distro, an ancillary cannabis distribution company on the East Coast. Facing financial challenges and a desire for rapid growth, Charlie pitches his business to a panel of investors, laying out his vision for expanding his product offerings and capturing a larger market share.
Video.title: Fund Tank - Day 1 Distro

Video.summary: Guy Mounier, the CEO of Aptivio, seeks a $500,000 investment to expand his AI-driven lead generation business. Aptivio's AI engine, similar to ChatGPT, analyzes online behavior to identify potential clients. However, the investors express concerns about market saturation and the clarity of Aptivio's value proposition.
Video.title: Fund Tank - Aptivio

Video.summary: Chad Honeycutt, owner and CEO of Evidence-Based Classroom Solutions, pitches his business. Chad discusses how his company addresses the deficit in evidence-based services for students with disabilities, particularly autism and emotional disabilities, in public schools. Despite significant revenue growth, Chad seeks investment due to cash flow challenges, primarily caused by delays in insurance reimbursements. The panel expresses concerns about profitability and the need for clearer communication about the company's mission.
Video.title: Fund Tank - Evidence Based Classroom Solutions

Image.alt: Fund Tank - Evidence Based Classroom Solutions
Fund Tank - Evidence Based Classroom Solutions
Fund Tank - Evidence Based Classroom Solutions

Video.summary: Phil Fogarty, owner of PSA Security, discusses his business struggles and funding needs with Joe Camberato, CEO of National Business Capital. Phil's security company faced challenges during the COVID-19 pandemic but pivoted successfully to provide social distance monitoring services, leading to significant revenue growth. Despite increasing demand, cash flow constraints hinder further expansion. Phil emphasizes his motivation to succeed for his family and seeks guidance on refining his pitch and understanding financial metrics.
Video.title: Fund Tank - PSA Security

Video.summary: In the following lesson, we'll discover how the ego mind influences both our way of thinking and our relationships. We'll also identify the unconscious barriers we've built that cause us to form these judgments and thoughts. That's where the problem is, and that's where the solution lies.
Video.title: Relationships: Overcoming the Ego Mind

Video.summary: Day 1 welcomes you to Desire Mapping—an approach to living guided by how you want to feel, not just what you want to do. By shifting from goal lists to heart-centered intention, this introduction invites you to honor presence, intuition, and the feelings that shape a fulfilling life.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Desire Map Course with Danielle LaPorte
Video.title: Part 1, Day 1 - Welcome

Video.summary: Desire Mapping guides you to live from the heart, focusing on how you want to feel rather than just what you want to do. Through practices like Soul Limber, appreciation, attention management, Core Desired Feelings, and exploring your inner selves, you gain clarity, agency, joy, and purpose in creating a fulfilling life.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Desire Map Course with Danielle LaPorte
Video.title: Part 1, Day 2-7

Video.summary: Set down your Core Desired Feelings and explore the words that shape your inner world. This practice reveals patterns, clarifies your choices, and turns intention into living energy. Your feelings and words become a beacon, guiding you to live from the heart with focus and purpose.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Desire Map Course with Danielle LaPorte
Video.title: Part 1, Day 8-10

Video.summary: Step into Intentional Creation using your Core Desired Feelings as your guide. Align actions with heart-centered intentions, release what no longer serves you, and transform your goals into sacred desires. Cultivate agency, joy, and flow as your inner world shapes your outer reality.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Desire Map Course with Danielle LaPorte
Video.title: The Desire Map Course Part 2 and 3

Image.alt: The Desire Map Course Part 2 and 3
The Desire Map Course Part 2 and 3
The Desire Map Course Part 2 and 3

Video.summary: Integrate your Core Desired Feelings through daily practice, reflection, and heart-centered rituals. Using mindfulness, breath, and prayer, cultivate sacred connection, peace, and purpose. Return to your heart each day, and let your love and clarity ripple into the world.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Desire Map Course with Danielle LaPorte
Video.title: The Desire Map Part 4

Video.summary: Do you feel both captivated and exhausted by city life? Are the conveniences worth the chaos? In this episode of the Rooted in Wellness podcast, join me, Wade Lightheart, and Matt Gallant as we explore the challenges of maintaining balance in busy urban environments and the serene contrast of ashram life.
Video.title: Wade Lightheart + Matt Gallant: Plant-Based Muscle Building, Digestion Optimization + Balancing Urban Life

Image.alt: Wade Lightheart + Matt Gallant: Plant-Based Muscle Building, Digestion Optimization + Balancing Urban Life
Wade Lightheart + Matt Gallant: Plant-Based Muscle Building, Digestion Optimization + Balancing Urban Life
Wade Lightheart + Matt Gallant: Plant-Based Muscle Building, Digestion Optimization + Balancing Urban Life

Video.summary: Have you wondered how to biohack your health as a woman? Taking control to live your best life is what we dive into in this episode with guest Aggie Lal.
Video.title: Aggie Lal: Secrets to Thriving Through Biohacking and Ancient Wisdom for Women

Image.alt: Aggie Lal: Secrets to Thriving Through Biohacking and Ancient Wisdom for Women
Aggie Lal: Secrets to Thriving Through Biohacking and Ancient Wisdom for Women
Aggie Lal: Secrets to Thriving Through Biohacking and Ancient Wisdom for Women

Video.summary: This episode is all about HOW to demonstrate your worth and we've never seen so many people pour themselves out and completely rebuild like we saw in this episode.
Video.title: Play To Win- Episode 3

Video.summary: Admissions tells a transformational tale about what it takes to find lasting peace.
Video.title: Admissions
